questions.q: How to Track my Order?
questions.a: Go to My Orders (Track Order) in your WoodenStreet account to track your order.

questions.q: My item has already reached the distribution center, what happens next?
questions.a: Once your order has reached the DC, you will receive a call prior from our delivery team to schedule your delivery.

questions.q: What should I do if I am relocating or out of town?
questions.a: Congratulations on your relocation! We can help you with that. You can raise a ticket (Raise Ticket) for the same and our team will coordinate.

questions.q: What should I do if I missed the delivery of my order today?
questions.a: In case you missed the delivery, the logistics partner will try to deliver the product on the next business day. You will receive a call prior from our delivery team to schedule it.

questions.q: What should I do if the delivery of my order is delayed?
questions.a: We try our best to deliver your order on time. In rare cases where a delay occurs, our support team will keep you updated through emails or tickets. A new delivery timeframe will be shared, and you can track status under My Orders.

questions.q: What is the estimated delivery time?
questions.a: The delivery time differs from product to product based on in-stock availability or made-to-order status and your location. Please check the product details tab on individual product pages for estimated delivery timelines.

questions.q: How do I check the current status of my product?
questions.a: To check the current status of your product, log into your WoodenStreet Account and go to My Orders to see the milestones.

questions.q: How can I change my delivery address?
questions.a: Kindly raise a support ticket for that order within 24 hours of placing the order. Our support desk will update the shipping details before dispatch.

questions.q: I am unable to check my order status or tracking, what should I do?
questions.a: If you are not able to check order status or tracking details, kindly raise a support ticket or contact our customer support line directly.

questions.q: Why does the promised Delivery date vary from one item to another?
questions.a: Key reasons are: non-availability of items in stock and products sourced from different sellers. In these cases, separate vendors dispatch items independently as per their manufacturing warehouse locations.

questions.q: What are the reasons behind late delivery or missed expected delivery date?
questions.a: Unlike other marketplaces, Woodenstreet does in-house manufacturing with a stringent quality check process. Production checks, seasoning delays, or transit clearances can occasionally cause delivery adjustments.

questions.q: Can woodenstreet give me free home delivery for my order?
questions.a: Yes, WoodenStreet provides free home delivery across major cities in India. However, in selective high-logistics zones, a nominal delivery and installation charge may be computed at checkout.

questions.q: Will my product deliver in apartments?
questions.a: Yes. However, in the absence of a service lift, our delivery partner shall only make a delivery to the ground floor. Extra doorstep carry charges may apply on request if delivery to upper floors is required without a lift.

questions.q: Can I take my delivery later than the date specified?
questions.a: Before dispatch from local distribution centers, our delivery executive calls you to schedule slots. You can request them to reschedule or hold the shipment for up to 7 days free of charge.

questions.q: Can I get all my products in one single delivery?
questions.a: If all items are of WoodenStreet brand and sourced from the same warehouse, they are consolidated. Items from separate vendors or different manufacturing hubs will be delivered on different dates.

questions.q: Can my security guard or neighbor receive my shipment if I am not available?
questions.a: Yes, they can. They will need to show a valid photo ID or connect with the delivery agent through a telephone verification call.

questions.q: How can I get the contact number of my delivery agent?
questions.a: As per company policy, direct contact numbers of field delivery representatives are not shared. Rest assured they will call you prior to arrival or in case of routing queries.

questions.q: What payment options do you support?
questions.a: We support Credit/Debit Cards, Net Banking, UPI (Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm), No-Cost EMIs, and Cash on Delivery (COD) for selected orders.

questions.q: Is No-Cost EMI available?
questions.a: Yes, we offer No-Cost EMI plans for 3-month and 6-month tenures on credit cards from partner banks. The interest charge is deducted as an upfront discount at checkout.

questions.q: How can I download my GST invoice?
questions.a: Log in to your account, visit My Orders, select the completed order, and click 'Download Invoice'. The GST registration detail will be listed.

questions.q: Can I change the billing or shipping name in the invoice?
questions.a: Invoice detail updates are permitted only before the product is dispatched. Please raise a support ticket immediately for corrections.

questions.q: How do I create a Wooden Street account?
questions.a: Click 'Sign In' in the header and register manually with your email/phone number, or use Google or Facebook quick login options.

questions.q: How can I update my profile mobile number or email?
questions.a: Go to Profile Settings in your dashboard, or raise a support ticket for assistance if authentication fails.

questions.q: What is the warranty period on solid wood furniture?
questions.a: All Wooden Street manufactured solid wood products carry a comprehensive 1-Year Warranty covering termite issues, wood splitting, and manufacturing defects.

questions.q: How do I claim product warranty?
questions.a: Please raise a support ticket under the Warranty Category, uploading clear images and invoice copies of the damaged segment. Our technical inspectors will review it within 48 hours.

questions.q: What should I do if my furniture arrives damaged?
questions.a: Note the physical damage details on the Proof of Delivery receipt and capture pictures of the unit. Raise a support ticket within 48 hours, and we will initiate a repair or replacement.

questions.q: What is your return window for defective furniture?
questions.a: Defective or damaged items can be reported for return or replacement within 7 days of delivery.
